sections.text: Latest Posts Design Tips & Best Practices Types of Holes in Engineering: Design, Symbols, and Manufacturing Guide Types of holes in engineering - illustration (Erye rubber & plastic parts) Key Takeaways Engineering holes are used to support fastening, alignment, bearing installation, fluid flow, and other functional requirements. The main types of holes include through holes, blind holes, threaded holes, counterbore holes, countersink holes, spotface holes, screw clearance holes, reamed holes, and dowel holes.
